name: JellyFlare
description: Display announcement banners at the top of the Jellyfin web UI. Set up rotating messages or a permanent notice with per-entry colours, flexible scheduling, dismiss controls and link support. All configured from the Jellyfin admin dashboard.

versions.changelog:
- (Tested, but use it with caution) Add a maintenance tab to let you work on your instance without user connecting to the server
- Add preview of affected users (maintenance)
- Add a reset button (maintenance) and link it to the global reset button
- Adjust dismiss button font sizes based on config settings
- Fixed close button visibility logic based on config

- Fixed the "hide all" configuration not being effective
- Added issue templates

Important changes:

- Update manifest description
- Add refresh prompt on each save
- Improve reset mechanism clarity with three distinct buttons and updated labels alongside alerts to save the config
- Improve alert rendering on misconfiguration on input validation
- Regroup isolated settings into Behavior category
- Dismissing a message, all messages, or the permanent banner now syncs instantly to other open tabs via a BroadcastChannel.
- Remove or update legacy code from first implementation

Various refactoring, safety and robustness fixes detailed below:

- `TextAlign` and `TransitionSpeed` are now whitelisted on save; invalid values normalise to `"center"` / `"normal"` rather than being stored verbatim.
- `parseInt` calls in `checkTimeWindow` now always pass radix `10`, preventing silent misparses on malformed time strings.
- Invalid-date checks for fixed schedules use `isNaN(date.getTime())` instead of `isNaN(date)` for clarity.
- `closeBtn.innerHTML` replaced with `closeBtn.textContent` for consistency with the rest of the codebase.
- Token retrieval deduplicated into a single `getToken()` helper used at both call sites.
- French tooltip text on the close and dismiss-all buttons replaced with English equivalents.
- Fixed a 50 ms race where the rotation timer could fire `tick()` before the navigation debounce resolved. The timer is now cleared immediately at the top of `onNavigate()` when `showInDashboard` is `false`.
- Plugin startup now gives up after a fixed retry count instead of looping indefinitely.
- Save endpoint rejects dangerous URL schemes (`javascript:` etc.) in both rotation and permanent entries.
- Save endpoint validates schedule types and returns a clear error for unknown values instead of silently defaulting to "always".
- Numeric settings (durations, banner height, active index) are clamped to their allowed ranges on save.
- Config changes are picked up on the next page navigation instead of waiting for the old rotation queue to finish.
- Layout recalculation now batches all reads before all writes, avoiding repeated forced reflows.
- Resize observer on the header is re-attached on every banner show, preventing stale references from rapid hide/show cycles.
- Rotation-message and permanent-entry row builders (~460 lines of duplicated code) replaced with a single shared factory function.
- Default presets, rotation messages, and permanent entries consolidated into one `CONFIG_DEFAULTS` object.
- Each Settings subsection (Appearance, Timing, Controls, Behaviour, Presets) has its own reset function; Reset and Wipe buttons delegate to these.
- Row-field collection extracted into a single shared helper used by both collect functions.
- Default text colour normalised to `#ffffff` in the data model for both rotation and permanent entries.
- Magic numbers in the banner script replaced with named constants (`BANNER_Z_INDEX`, `POPUP_Z_INDEX`, `MOBILE_BREAKPOINT`, etc.).
- Add drag and drop feature to messages collections
- Permanent banner can now optionally be dismissed, persistence behavior can be configured
- The app now tries to open link outside the in-app web browser framework, but for unsupported platform also let the user copy the url (better transparency)

- Fixed banner animation hiding first carousel arrows and title
- Added new default rotation entry
- Banner in dashboard visibility defaults to false and is set at the bottom of the config page
- Normalise line endings to inside jq before the value touches the shell

- Improved admin dashboard detection, add warning for the visibility option
- Fixed XSS vector: banner link URLs are now validated against an allowlist (https://, http://, /); any other scheme including javascript: is silently rejected
- Fixed privilege escalation: the config save endpoint (POST /JellyFlare/config) now requires admin-level credentials (RequiresElevation policy); standard user tokens are rejected
- Config and script endpoints now require authentication; unauthenticated visitors receive no banner and cannot read plugin configuration: the plugin is intended for registered users only, consistent with JS Injector
- CI actions pinned to full commit SHAs to eliminate supply-chain risk from re-tagged upstream actions

- add configurable sizes for dismiss buttons in settings;
- add option to show banner in admin dashboard.

- permanent banner can be disabled but still saved;
- add customization to hide all button and close button.
- add quick access to the plugin from the dashboard sidebar
